error: op_host/mean_reduction_over_a_dimension_custom_mwlibwccrnzcosve20260310031025.cpp:42:66: error: cannot convert ‘const gert::Shape*’ to ‘const gert::StorageShape*’ in initialization
summary: Fix the host InferShape signature by reading input shapes as gert::Shape instead of gert::StorageShape; the final solution also keeps the wrapper and kernel aligned with that corrected host interface.

error: [FAIL] ModelNew.__init__() takes 1 positional argument but 2 were given
summary: Make ModelNew accept the same init argument list as the torch reference, specifically the dim parameter, so verification can instantiate the custom model without an interface mismatch.
When direct multi-core GM scalar accumulation produces partial output mismatches, first collapse the kernel to a single core to remove partitioning effects before debugging the memory path.
Replace direct strided GM GetValue accumulation with a safer pattern that DataCopies each contiguous reduce row into UB and accumulates there before producing the mean.

After UB scalar updates, add explicit MTE2-to-scalar and scalar-to-MTE3 synchronization and write the final row back with DataCopy; without these events the local-buffer reads and writes can pass compilation but fail correctness.
